,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7605951362941078590","book_info":{"abstract":"林灵穿越了。《诸天万界、后宫、穿越）
穿到一个修仙世界，四灵根废材，炼气三层，守着一条微型灵脉和几亩破灵田，穷得叮当响。
但他有个金手指——穿越之门。
可以去任何他知道的虚构世界。
于是，画风开始不对劲了。
在《超能失控》，他吸爆水晶，精神力飙到筑基期。
在《海贼王》，他杀阿龙、吃恶魔果实、种下宝树亚当、拐走小贼猫娜美。
在修仙界，他从散修梦里偷来地仙传承，开辟虚幻世界，种下世界树。
在《鬼灭之刃》，他宰了鬼舞辻无惨，捡回恋柱甘露寺蜜璃。
一路收集法则，一路开后宫。
诺琪高、娜美、甘露寺……
一个接一个，全被他拐回无人岛。
世界树越长越高，虚幻世界越来越大，三千大道一点点收集。
炼气、筑基、金丹、元婴——
他踩着诸天万界的资源，一路往上爬。
【作者有话说】

新人新书，求收藏求推荐求打赏！

每天两更，说到做到！

诸天万界，林灵的道，才刚刚开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7ddab079013f7cee9a2ae8b7436992fa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"世界那么大66","author_id":"","book_id":"7605951362941078590","book_name":"别卷了，穿越诸天开后宫去","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606387514462454334","read_count":"16971","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"216496"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"99","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,穿越,海贼,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7ddab079013f7cee9a2ae8b7436992fa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163134&x-signature=ve%2B8GMdve1cFw74B3%2BJ%2F5kDWe8k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3952078678397419","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320115854A872511FD756B0F7C2BD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_cou
